---
title: "qp Manual"
---

`qp` is a repo-local task runner and workflow runtime driven by one `qp.yaml`.

## Start Here

1. Install `qp`.
2. Scaffold or adapt `qp.yaml`.
3. Run `qp list`, `qp help <task>`, and `qp check`.
4. Add DAGs, expressions, and profiles as your repo grows.

## Why This Manual

This guide is split across focused pages so you can jump straight to the part you need:

- task modeling and parameters
- DAG execution
- CEL expressions
- vars/templates/profiles/secrets
- structured events and JSON output
- Windows daemon mode
- cookbook recipes

## Quick Install

```bash
go install github.com/neural-chilli/qp/cmd/qp@latest
```

Then in a repo:

```bash
qp init
qp list
qp check
```
